message:
style(lyapunov): use i128::from() instead of as-cast for nanos conversion

Replace `as i128` casts with `i128::from()` for deadline and now
nanosecond conversions. This satisfies clippy's cast_lossless lint
while maintaining identical behavior (u64 -> i128 is always lossless).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
